name: Junxian Wang
tagline: M. Computer Science & B. Electrical Engineering · Problem Solver · Builder · Educator
bio: I'm a Computer Science and Electrical Engineering graduate with a deep passion for coding, technology, and science. I love to explore new things across software and hardware, and I find joy in tackling complex problems — breaking them down into digestible, logical pieces. Designing solutions that benefit others is what drives me, and I genuinely enjoy teaching and sharing knowledge. When I'm not coding, you'll find me on the badminton or tennis court, gaming, or lost in a good book.
contactMessage: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of something amazing. Feel free to reach out!

highlights.title: Passionate Coder
highlights.description: I thrive on logical puzzles and immerse myself in complex problem solving.

highlights.title: Tech Explorer
highlights.description: Constantly exploring new frontiers in software, hardware, and science.

highlights.title: Educator
highlights.description: I love breaking down hard concepts into logical chunks and teaching others.

highlights.title: Lifelong Learner
highlights.description: Always curious, always growing — from circuits to code and beyond.

details: Focus on algorithms, data structures, and software engineering
Senior capstone project in full-stack web application development
Specialization in embedded systems and digital signal processing
Hands-on experience with circuit design and FPGA programming
Research assistant in IoT and sensor systems lab

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Building scalable microservices and full-stack applications. Led migration of monolithic system to event-driven architecture, improving performance by 40%.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Developed internal dashboards and automated data pipelines. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ship customer-facing features.

experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
experience.description: Designed and programmed embedded sensor systems for environmental monitoring. Published research on low-power communication protocols.

projects.title: Smart Home Dashboard
projects.description: Full-stack IoT dashboard for monitoring and controlling smart home devices in real time. Features live sensor data, automation rules, and responsive design.

projects.title: Algorithm Visualizer
projects.description: Interactive tool for visualizing sorting algorithms, pathfinding, and graph traversals. Built to help students understand data structures and algorithms.

projects.title: Low-Power Sensor Network
projects.description: Designed and built a mesh network of environmental sensors using custom PCBs. Includes a web interface for data visualization and alerting.

projects.title: Technical Blog & Tutorials
projects.description: A collection of in-depth articles on algorithms, system design, and embedded programming. Aimed at making complex topics accessible.

projects.title: Community Workshop Series
projects.description: Organized and led a series of workshops teaching high school students programming fundamentals, robotics, and web development.

projects.title: Open Source Contributions
projects.description: Active contributor to multiple open-source projects including developer tools, documentation improvements, and bug fixes.
